assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment (Run 1): SaaS Churn Prediction

Four issues: (1) Random account split across 36 months = temporal leakage; (2) Full cohort preprocessing before split; (3) Logistic regression at canonical L2 vs. end-to-end trained LSTM = asymmetric optimization; (4) ROC-AUC as primary metric — B2B churn intervention needs Precision@10% or AUPRC.

Verdict: critique_wins
